title: statice companyonis subsp. legrandii
intro: Statice companyonis subsp. legrandii, also known as Company's statice, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is a perennial plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
